---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Supra Modeler
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the modeling workflow this would enable or improve.

## Reference
If applicable, describe how this works in other tools (Plasticity, Alias, Rhino, etc.)

## Priority
How important is this to your workflow?
- [ ] Critical — blocking my use of Supra
- [ ] High — would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement
